description: arXiv:2607.17782v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Foundation models pretrained using self-supervised learning have transformed computer vision by learning transferable representations from large-scale unlabeled data. author: Moona Mazher, Abdul Qayyum, Steven A. Niederer, Daniel C. Alexander
